chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5623 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 13.08.2025 Mr. Bahzad Haider advocate for the petitioners Mr. Qamaruddin DPG DSP Raza Mian Legal-II CPO -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Pursuant to order dated 03.04.2025, a compliance report has been submitted by AIGP-Legal-II, CPO Sindh Karachi. The Petitioner may approach CRO Review Committee under the relevant SOPs for redressal of his grievance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE WasimPS
